positive: A central, highly stylized illustration featuring a harmonious arrangement of blooming mandalas and mystical celestial flora (such as moon petals and glowing nebula elements). The composition should be highly symmetrical, clean, and suitable for repeating or single-placement apparel printing. Use a strong, limited color palette of deep indigo, sapphire blue, soft lavender, and luminous gold accents. The style must be a modern, graphic vector illustration mixed with intricate Art Nouveau etching details, creating clean silhouettes and strong contrast against a neutral background. Emphasize sharp lines, geometric patterns, and glowing bioluminescent accents. Highly detailed, vector graphic, high contrast, central composition.
negative: blurry, low resolution, noise, jpeg artifacts, watermark, text, signature, logo, cropped, poorly rendered hands, bad anatomy, multiple subjects, messy, grainy, abstract noise
